## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Changes

- [ ] Files changed are scoped and justified
- [ ] Contractive invariant preserved: `q_t < 1 - epsilon` (or explicitly handled)

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Coverage does not regress materially
- [ ] New/updated tests added for changed behavior

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit title
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies
- [ ] No hidden telemetry/network side effects
- [ ] Public API changes documented
